_curation_status: SEED_ONLY — 3 representative cases. Production target per docs/ai-implementation-plan.md ticket 1.2.4: 50 hand-rated (candidate-profile, expected-relevant-jobs) tuples with mean hit-rate ≥ 40%. The expectedJobIds in the seed cases use placeholder IDs that will not match real job rows — domain expert needs to map each profile to actual jobs from the prod catalog.
description: Candidate-recommendations golden cases. Each case = a profile summary + license states → expected job IDs the candidate would likely apply to. Hit-rate ≥ minHitRate per case to pass.

input.profileSummary: Board-Certified PMHNP-BC with 7 years adult telehealth experience. Specializes in mood disorders, anxiety, substance use. Multi-state license, prefers remote.
Senior PMHNP-BC, 12 years child & adolescent psychiatry. Specializes in ADHD, anxiety, eating disorders. East coast multi-state license.
PMHNP-BC with X-waiver and addiction psychiatry focus. 5 years inpatient + outpatient SUD treatment. Open to telehealth.
